## What does this PR do?

<!-- One clear sentence. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New detector (ecosystem / framework)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## For new detectors

- [ ] Added to `src/detectors/frameworks.ts` (or the relevant detector file)
- [ ] Added test fixture in `tests/fixtures/`
- [ ] Added tests in `tests/core/`
- [ ] Tested against a real repository of this type

## Testing

How was this tested?

```
npx codeglance /path/to/test-repo
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion (keep the dep count low)
